summary: Iteration 114: POS Auto-Router feature fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All tabs, filters, and interactions verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: POS Auto-Router correctly seeds 9 chit printers and 5 revenue centers on startup
Auto-routes 131 banquet catalog items + 55 mixology R&D items = 186 total (187 with test item)
117 global beverages shared across all outlets with bars
Printer assignment with per-outlet overrides working correctly
Supplier alerts correctly flag 54 ingredients as critical (no inventory seeded)
Frontend panel has all 5 tabs: Dashboard, POS Items, Chit Printers, Global Beverages, Supplier Alerts
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: POS items auto-seeded from banquet catalog (131) and mixology R&D (55) via POST /api/pos-router/seed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 114 tested POS Auto-Router feature. All backend APIs working: seed, dashboard, items (with filters), printers, revenue-centers, global-beverages, printer assignment, wine-list, supplier-alerts, manual item creation. Frontend panel accessible via FINANCIAL & PURCHASING sidebar section. 9 chit printers, 5 revenue centers, 187 POS items (186 auto-routed + 1 test manual), 117 global beverages, 55 mixology items.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/pos-router/seed - seeds revenue centers, printers, auto-routes items - PASSED
GET /api/pos-router/dashboard - returns stats with all required fields - PASSED
GET /api/pos-router/items?outlet=pool_bar - returns items with effective_printer resolved - PASSED
GET /api/pos-router/global-beverages - returns 117 global beverage items - PASSED
GET /api/pos-router/global-beverages?outlet=pool_bar - resolves effective_printer per outlet - PASSED
PUT /api/pos-router/items/{item_id}/printer - sets printer for an item - PASSED
PUT /api/pos-router/items/{item_id}/printer with outlet - sets per-outlet printer override - PASSED
POST /api/pos-router/items - creates manual POS item - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: POS Auto-Router panel opens via FINANCIAL & PURCHASING sidebar - PASSED
Dashboard tab shows 187 total items, 117 global beverages, 9 printers, 5 revenue centers - PASSED
Dashboard shows breakdown by source, GL account, and chit printer - PASSED
POS Items tab shows filterable table with 100 rows (limited display) - PASSED
POS Items tab has search input, source filter, printer filter, outlet select - PASSED
Printer dropdown changes work (changed bar to pastry) - PASSED
Source filter works (mixology_rd shows 55 items) - PASSED
Outlet filter works (pool_bar shows 121 items) - PASSED
Chit Printers tab shows 9 printer cards with details - PASSED
Chit Printers tab shows 5 revenue center cards (BNQ, REST, POOL, LNG, IRS) - PASSED
Supplier Alerts tab shows 54 total alerts, 54 critical, 0 warning - PASSED
All tabs have correct data-testid attributes - PASSED

chit_printers: Kitchen Cold / Garde Manger (kitchen_cold) @ Main Kitchen

mocked_apis.note: POS connections to external systems (Toast, Aloha, etc.) are simulated. The auto-routing of menu items to POS records is real and stored in MongoDB.
